Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption", -1) < 0.001 AND coalesce(bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption", -1) < 0.001 AND NOT (coalesce(abs(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption"), 0) < 0.001) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/6a32aa28ff6a857bec627595cb1a8c622fce1f2f69993ff8f9b35503b45f3065/92428366-6746-47ce-a18b-90462adc7036/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
